scope: Prepared direct grouped-BMM probes for the S4096 routed-MoE bottleneck identified after the M=12288 one-expert GEMM floor passed target.

why.prior_direct_large_gemm: M=12288 one-expert BF16 GEMMs are 0.40-0.60 ms, under the 1.3 ms/expert target.
why.prior_integrated_profile: S4096 routed MoE backward is still around 31 ms for dgrad and 31 ms for wgrad, dominated by grouped/ragged batched GEMMs in the rocprof block summary.
why.next_question: Measure the actual grouped batched shape used by routed MoE: 384 experts with small rows per expert, current-like transposed operands, and copy-cost timing.

probe-grouped-bmm-s4096-balanced.read: Balanced S4096/topk6 cyclic proxy, no global-max learned-route padding.

probe-grouped-bmm-s4096-padded88.read: Proxy for the learned-router S4096 max-padded route where 384 experts x 88 rows = 33,792 padded assignments.

commands_ready.balanced_actual: RUN_TAG=grouped_bmm_s4096_20260531 GROUPED_BMM_LAYOUT=actual TARGET_HOST=do-sonle-kernel CONTAINER=b9d33e6e8227 WAIT_IDLE_SECONDS=300 WAIT_IDLE_INTERVAL_SECONDS=15 bash experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/tools/dsv4_layer_microbench/run_retained_mi350_suite.sh probe-grouped-bmm-s4096-balanced

run_attempts_this_turn.reason: Idle guard found active external Python KFD processes.
The launcher observed no active KFD processes, then SSH reset during the stage/run boundary before a summary artifact was produced.

expected_read_after_probe.if_grouped_bmm_matches_rocprof_6ms: The problem is small-M grouped batched GEMM library efficiency/scheduling. Focus on compact-native grouped kernels, AITER/CK/Triton small-M grouped GEMM alternatives, or bucketing by row count.
expected_read_after_probe.if_grouped_bmm_is_fast_but_integrated_re: The bottleneck is likely dispatch/gather/reduce materialization or autograd wrapper overhead around the GEMMs, so focus on fusion and saved compact tensors.
expected_read_after_probe.if_materialized_transpose_is_much_faster: Consider materializing wgrad lhs or changing saved activation layout, but only if full-layer timing beats the current compact-reduce path after copy cost.

validation_completed.node_idle_before_attempt: intermittent; external jobs repeatedly started on do-sonle-kernel
